_comment: Upstream skill sources vendored into hikspine. Re-run scripts/sync-upstream.sh to refresh. These dirs are read-only mirrors — never edit vendored skills by hand; layer customizations as separate hikspine skills.

vendors.name: openspec
vendors._profileNote: Expanded workflow profile. The 'workflows' list drives which openspec-* skills get generated. 'core' would give only explore/propose/apply/archive/sync; the list below adds new/continue/ff/verify/bulk-archive/onboard (notably openspec-new-change and openspec-verify-change).
